name: Frieren - A Word of Advice
description:
“It’s okay to let go.”

She comforts you in your moment of anguish.

established relationship pov

say swear we leaving J.AI in 2026...

So, I’m not that chronically online to the point where I keep up with JAI news or anything related to this site on a consistent basis, but I DID just see that post made by a former mod.

All I really care to say is that moderation has been proven to be absolute dogshit, but not to the fault of the actual moderators but by the incompetence of Shep and the devs to communicate on a professional and effective level.

If anything this has given most users on the site who were already unhappy with the current state of the site, with that being the lack of transparency etc., a reason furthermore to jump ship and leave JAI as it rolls up into the stinking cow turd it has become.

I don’t say this because I hate Shep or absolutely loathe the site. I actually am very fond of this site. The UI being a major factor as to why I continue to use the app because of how simple it is to use. I say this because I feel like the way JAI has become, it’s blatantly obvious this is no longer a passion project but instead a slow road to the site being sold to a company. Even as a small creator who doesn’t make bots all the time, I’ve noticed the signs of it. If you really like your bots, or invested in bot making I’d suggest looking for different platforms to make them on.
creator: jslacko
